name: Contact Page
description: Contact page with heading, map and contact info, contact form, FAQ accordion, and social share.

fields.subtitle: Whether you have a question, a project idea, or just want to say hello — we'd love to hear from you.

fields.heading: Visit Our Office
fields.address:
742 Evergreen Terrace, Suite 400
Portland, OR 97201
United States
fields.hours:
Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST
Saturday – Sunday: Closed

fields.heading: Send Us a Message
fields.description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within one business day.
fields.success_message: Thank you for reaching out! We'll respond within 24 hours.

items.title: What's the typical response time?
items.content: We respond to all inquiries within one business day. For urgent matters, call us directly at +1 (503) 555-0142.

items.title: Do you offer free consultations?
items.content: Yes! We offer a free 30-minute discovery call where we learn about your project, discuss feasibility, and provide an initial recommendation — no strings attached.

items.title: What information should I include in my message?
items.content: The more context the better. Include your project timeline, budget range if known, any technical requirements, and links to reference sites or documents. This helps us prepare a more useful response.

items.title: Do you work with international clients?
items.content: Absolutely. We have offices in Portland, London, and Singapore, and regularly work with clients across North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific. All meetings can be conducted remotely via video call.

items.title: Can I visit your office?
items.content: Of course! We welcome in-person visits at our Portland headquarters. Please email or call ahead so we can prepare a meeting room and have the right team members available.
